name: chromium-bridge
description: Authenticated MCP bridge to your real Chromium browsers - bun workspace root.

scripts.gen: bun scripts/gen-ops.ts && biome format --write src/packages/shared/src/ops.gen.ts src/packages/shared/src/identity.gen.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p src/apps/extension && tsc -p tests/browser && tsc -p scripts && tsc -p src/packages/shared
scripts.build: bun run --cwd src/packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd src/apps/extension build && tsc -p scripts && cargo build --workspace
scripts.test: bun run --cwd src/packages/shared test && bun run --cwd src/apps/extension test
